overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through Night City at night during rainy conditions. The player navigates a futuristic vehicle through multiple districts including The Glen and Wellsprings, passing neon-lit commercial buildings, construction zones, and dense urban canyons with towering skyscrapers.

events.description: slowing down behind a white truck stopped at red traffic light
making a right turn at the intersection onto city street

agents.ego_description: driving on elevated highway, decelerating for traffic, then executing a right turn at the intersection

notable_agents.action: white pickup truck stopped at traffic light ahead of ego vehicle

entered.detail: yellow metal guardrail with reflective strips along the right side of the elevated roadway
large illuminated advertisements with pink and cyan lighting on distant building facades
concrete overpass with support columns crossing perpendicular above the highway
tall industrial poles with multiple lamp heads illuminating the wet road surface

segments.scene_description: Driving on an elevated highway at night in the rain, approaching an intersection. The vehicle slows behind a white pickup truck waiting at a red light, with neon billboards visible on the left and yellow guardrails lining the right side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial city street in The Glen district

events.description: entering The Glen district as indicated by on-screen text notification
passing through intersection with green traffic light

agents.ego_description: accelerating to cruising speed through city streets, passing commercial buildings and pedestrian walkways

entered.detail: multi-story building with illuminated windows and ground-level storefronts
elevated concrete walkway with glass sides crossing above the street
zebra crossing markings on the wet asphalt with yellow borders

segments.scene_description: Cruising through The Glen district on city streets lined with commercial buildings. The vehicle passes under a pedestrian overpass and through intersections, with neon billboards now closer on the left and street lights illuminating the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with heavy neon signage and storefronts

events.description: making a left turn at intersection with crosswalk
stopping at red traffic light then proceeding on green

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense commercial area with heavy pedestrian presence, turning at intersections and stopping at traffic signals

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with purple umbrella waiting at crosswalk corner

entered.detail: cluster of bright pink, cyan, and yellow neon signs covering building facades with Japanese characters
storefront with glowing cyan entrance and digital display screens

segments.scene_description: Driving through a dense commercial zone saturated with neon signage in multiple colors. The vehicle makes a left turn at an intersection where pedestrians wait with umbrellas, passing storefronts with glowing entrances and stopping at traffic lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area with construction barriers entering Wellsprings district

events.description: entering Wellsprings district as indicated by on-screen text notification
making a sharp left turn around construction barriers onto elevated roadway

agents.ego_description: driving along elevated road past construction zones, navigating around barriers while entering Wellsprings district

entered.detail: yellow and white striped concrete barriers lining the right side of the road
tall concrete wall with glowing blue rectangular panels
curved elevated roadway structure with support columns ahead

segments.scene_description: Transitioning onto an elevated roadway marked by construction barriers and sound walls with blue lighting. The vehicle enters Wellsprings district and navigates a sharp left turn around the barriers, with an overpass ramp visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense downtown urban canyon with towering skyscrapers

events.description: passing large holographic billboard displaying animated advertisements between skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: speeding through narrow urban canyon between massive skyscrapers with large digital displays

entered.detail: tall dark glass tower with vertical illuminated windows rising high above the street
massive building facade with grid patterns and vertical lighting strips
giant floating digital advertisement displaying product imagery with cyan and pink lighting

segments.scene_description: Driving through a dense urban canyon flanked by massive skyscrapers on both sides. Large holographic billboards float between the towers displaying bright advertisements, creating a narrow corridor of neon-lit glass and steel architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-slicked metropolis that evolves from an elevated highway into a claustrophobic canyon of towering skyscrapers. It begins on a high road where the vehicle slows behind a white pickup truck at a red light, flanked by yellow guardrails and distant neon billboards. As the car descends into The Glen, the perspective shifts to street-level cruising under pedestrian overpasses, passing closer neon signage and pedestrians with umbrellas before making a left turn through a saturated commercial zone. The scene then transitions onto an elevated roadway marked by blue-lit construction barriers and sound walls as the vehicle navigates a sharp turn into the Wellsprings district. Finally, the environment narrows into a dense urban canyon where massive skyscrapers and floating holographic advertisements create a corridor of glowing glass and steel.
